Name: FButtonStyle
Description: Represents the appearance of an SButton

Variables.Name: Normal
Variables.Description: Button appearance when the button is not hovered or pressed

Variables.Name: Disabled
Variables.Description: Button appearance when disabled, by default this is set to an invalid resource when that is the case default disabled drawing is used.

Variables.Name: NormalPadding
Variables.Description:
Padding that accounts for the border in the button's background image.
	  When this is applied, the content of the button should appear flush
	  with the button's border. Use this padding when the button is not pressed.

Variables.Name: PressedPadding
Variables.Description:
Same as NormalPadding but used when the button is pressed. Allows for moving the content to match
	  any "movement" in the button's border image.

Variables.Name: PressedSlateSound
Variables.Description: The sound the button should play when pressed

Variables.Name: HoveredSlateSound
Variables.Description: The sound the button should play when initially hovered over
